response.justification: Bogdan has deep full-stack engineering experience and a strong track record in distributed systems, real-time applications, and open-source tooling, including contributions to agentic workflows via MCP frameworks — but lacks clear evidence of executive leadership at scale, regulated fintech deployment, or multi-agent AI systems in production financial contexts, which are core to the role.
strengths: Extensive experience with event-driven systems and real-time infrastructure across multiple languages (DLang, Node.js, TypeScript)
Demonstrated contributions to agentic AI tooling (MCP code generators) and open-source frameworks with production use
Proven ability to build and lead engineering culture through workshops, TDD advocacy, and CI/CD infrastructure
concerns: No explicit evidence of leading engineering teams from 10 to 30+ or developing senior technical leadership layers
Lacks documented experience in regulated fintech domains (credit risk, working capital, compliance infrastructure)
No clear demonstration of multi-agent AI architecture in high-stakes commercial environments with feedback loops and observability
